Plan: 4 to modify.

Summary by type:
  views: 3 to modify
  materialized views: 1 to modify

Views:
  ~ employee_emails
  ~ employee_names
  ~ employee_secure

Materialized views:
  ~ employee_summary

DDL to be executed:
--------------------------------------------------

ALTER VIEW employee_emails SET (security_invoker=true);

ALTER VIEW employee_names SET (security_invoker=true);

ALTER VIEW employee_secure RESET (security_invoker);

ALTER MATERIALIZED VIEW employee_summary SET (fillfactor=80);
